# Create Project

Create a new Powerlines project.

## Usage

The `create` command can be executed using the following syntax:

<details>
<summary>Using npm:</summary>

```sh
npx powerlines create [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using yarn:</summary>

```sh
yarn exec powerlines create [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using pnpm:</summary>

```sh
pnpm exec powerlines create [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using bun:</summary>

```sh
bun x powerlines create [options]
```

</details>

The following options are available for the `create` command:
